---
title: "Licenses & Access"
---

**What you need to know:**

- GitHub Copilot requires either a WB-provided licence or a personal subscription
- WB Copilot: 300 premium requests/month; overuse requires manager-approved budget
- Private Copilot Pro: 500 req/mo; Copilot Pro+: 1500 req/mo
- Monitor your usage in GitHub settings to avoid unexpected charges

---

## Licence Options

| Plan | How to get it | Premium requests / month | Claude & GPT-4.5 |
|------|--------------|--------------------------|------------------|
| **WB Copilot** (via WB org) | Request via GitHub Settings + email to [github@worldbank.org](mailto:github@worldbank.org) | 300 | ✅ |
| **Copilot Pro** (private) | [Subscribe](https://github.com/features/copilot/plans) | 500 | ✅ |
| **Copilot Pro+** (private) | [Subscribe](https://github.com/features/copilot/plans) | 1500 | ✅ |
| **No Copilot** | — | ❌ | ❌ |

::: callout-note
"Premium requests" cover agent-mode interactions and use of non-default models (Claude, GPT-4.5). Standard completions and basic chat do not count toward the limit.
:::

---

## Monitor Your Usage

1. Go to [GitHub → Settings → Copilot features](https://github.com/settings/copilot/features)
2. Scroll down to the **Usage** section
3. The percentage shown is your use of the monthly premium request limit

---

## WB Overuse Budget

If you regularly exceed 300 requests/month on the WB plan:

1. Ask your manager to approve a budget code for Copilot overuse
2. Set a monthly spending cap (you pay only for actual usage)
3. Email [github@worldbank.org](mailto:github@worldbank.org) with your budget code, cc your manager

<!-- TODO: add direct link to the WB internal eServices form for Copilot overuse budget request -->

---

## Software Licences

| Tool | Licence | Notes |
|------|---------|-------|
| Stata | Commercial | WB provides institutional licence |
| R | GPL | Free and open source |
| Python | PSF | Free and open source |
| Positron | AGPL | Free, built by Posit |
| Quarto | GPL | Free, built by Posit |
| Git | GPL | Free and open source |
| Stata MCP extension | MIT | Free, open source |

---

## Code & Materials Licence

*Placeholder – add the licence for the course materials and code here (e.g., CC-BY 4.0, MIT, etc.).*
